logs.message: Infrastructure depends on Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens (>= 8.0.4) but Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens 8.0.4 was not found. Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens 8.1.0 was resolved instead.
Package 'HtmlSanitizer' 8.1.870 has a known moderate severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j92c-7v7g-gj3f
